titleStmt.title: SII 24.293: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 293. (A.R. No. 58 of 1892.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

p.hi: No date

summary.p: Contains a long praśasti of Muddaya-Daṇḍanāyaka, minister of Harihara II, in Sanskrit and Grantha.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. IV, No. 505.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: svasti śrī . Avanītalakalpapādapa hariharanarapāḷabhāgyapariṇāha . jayaśālivikramōdaya muddayadaṇḍēśa bhuvi jayī bhūyāḥ . svasti samastabhūmaṇḍalamaṇḍana bhujādaṇḍa . varttamānarāyaparamēśvara . pūrvapaścimadakṣiṇōttarasamudrai kanāyaka . bhāṣātilaṅghirājanyabhujaṅga . hindurāyasuratrāṇa . śaraṇā gata ta

nuja . rājādhirāja . rājaparamēśvara . śrīvīrahariharamahārājakāruṇya kumāra . sukṛtakumāra . śrīvīrahariharakulakramāgata mahāpradhānamūrddhanya . māhātmyadhanya [.] rāyarājagurupitāmaha śrīmacchaivāgamamantrasiddha . nikhila śaivāgamācāryakriyāśaktigurucaraṇāmburuharājabhṛṅga . Abhaṅgasat saṅga . śrīmatsvayambhutryambakapādapatmā
rādhaka . saddharmma nēya
paripālanasumantra . vijītaparamantra .
p.note: a vijitaparamantra | is written below the line.
p.hi: svāmipratāpasamvanarddhanayōgandharāyaṇa .

sathatanārāyaṇa . svāmisampatkamali nīvikāsamārttāṇḍa . Akhaṇḍaguṇagaṇālaṅkṛtabrahmāṇḍa . svāmikāruṇyacandrikōpajīvanacatu racakōra . samaraghāra . svāmivaibhavāvalōkanamuditalōcana . praṇata daurggatyavimōcana . svāmiguṇagaṇā kēsa . svāmiyaśassaura(.)bhāghrāṇaniyatasau

kṣaṇōttamāṅga . svāmicittānusaraṇanivarttana . svāmisaddharmmaghaṭanākēḷi suvihitāvadhāna . sakalajananidhāna . svāmiśīlānubamdhakandaḷita hṛdayaānanda . bhuvanarakṣāmukunda . svāmicaraṇasēvanaika sarvadēvatābhiva ndana . svāmisattapraśāsitaviśvāsamudra . bhadraguṇa śāsanābhimudritacatu ssamudra . Udayadharaṇibhradaparagirimalayaśikharikanaka dharaṇīdharakaṭakaviharada mandabandhurasūktikīrttipūra . sarasa

dahanadāvānala . yavanakulakālānala . svāmisampatvighātakādribhaṅgadambhōḷi samrambha . sachalasatkriyārambha . svāmivākyavighaṭakaśiraḥ prabhaṭakaṭhōra . svāmisamahitājñāvilaṅghakāmbhōdhikumbhasambhava . svāmisamudyōgabha
natarubha
naprabha
prajāparivārānurajñana . svāmivibhavaviddhvasakaśa rabhabhēruṇḍa . vidvēṣakāla ddāla . samhratō ttāla .
pa . vimalaguṇagaṇakusumasurabhivividhavibhavaphalōl
si nītival
rīvēl
ta daśadigantavistāra . sambhāvitasabhāstāra . Ēkādhipatyabhūṣitapata
pratiṣṭhita . dvividhakarmmaniṣṭhita . tribhuvanābhinanditasvāmisatkāra . caturupāya vihitavima ta pañcakṛtyanirata . pañcavaktrakāruṇyapātra . ṣaḍvidhabalōpabramhitavija yadaṇḍayā
daśadikprakāśatējaḥ prabhākara . śatamakhapramukhabahimmukha
nivahasādarādīyamāna nija(nija)makhahavirbhāga . bahumakhānubhāva . bhūsurāmātya
p.note: The letters mātya are inserted above the line.
p.hi: pariṣadāśīrva cananisarjjitadurjjanābhiyōga . sahasramukhasatkriyāprayōga . lakṣakōṭi gaṇanātiśāyi caturaṅgabalaśamitavimatabhadra . balavijitabalabhadra . pradha
bhūṣitabhujaśikhara . hariharanṛpatisarvāṅgasamrakṣaṇavicakṣaṇapratibhānu ṣaṅga . prakaṭitapratinṛpābhiṣaṅga . Aśvahṛdayarēvanta . Ā

śīkṛtāśēṣa sāmanta . Iṣṭārtthadānavadānnyakara . Īśvaracaraṇakiṅkara . Urvvītaḷapāri jāta . Ūrjjitamahimanirjjitārātijana . ṛtavacanasurabhitavadanakamala . ṛūkāra mantrabhāvanāvimala . lṛutakajanadarppaśōṣaṇa . lṛuvilāsabhūṣaṇa . Ēka bhāvaracitaguruvarasabhājana . Aiśvaryavikāsabhājana . Ojasvimādhurya kalpitadhai
ryasuślāgha . Oḷadāryakāḷamēgha . Amgavaṅgakaliṅkagāmbōja

śūraśūra sēnamalahamāḷavamagadhamahārāṣṭratuḷuvatuṇḍirapāṇḍyapāñcāḷa nicuḷa nēpāḷahalikahammīrakūṭakūntaḷa kaṭakakarṇṇāṭa saraḷasaurāṣṭra pramukhavividharāṣṭra pratiṣṭhāpitajayastambha kaṇṭhōktavikramōnmēṣa . Asurādhi daivatōpāsanalabdhavidyāviśēṣa . śēṣāhibhōga bhāsurabāhudaṇḍa . daṇḍanāyakādhipatyanityōtsava . Utsavārambha gambhīrabhērīravabadhiritadu ṣasa la

vivaśravaṇavivara . varaturaṅgādhirōhanakula . kuladharmmavarddhana . dhanavarṣa nirvvāpitadīnajanas(ā)ntāpa . tāpasatapaḥ pratyūhatimira tapanamaṇḍala . maṇḍa lāgralīlāsamākṛṣṭamaṇḍalēśabhūcakra . cakravāḷagirikaṭakajaṅghāla samarā padānāmbuja . bāḷitagaṇḍaripuvēdaṇḍa
mastakanastalamau ktikālaṅkratachchatra daṇḍa . daṇḍaviṣayitapararājamaṇḍala . maṇḍalikagarvvaparvvatakhaṇḍ(ā)nākhaṇḍala . vita raṇaguṇavijitasurabhisuramaṇisuraviṭapidhanadajaladharasa

vitṛtanaya . sahajavinaya . pratibhaṭakṣatraparaśurāma . parākramābhirāma . nijanīti ninhutasuraguruprabhāva . mahānubhāva . pāṣaṇḍamatapāṇḍityakhaṇḍana . yaśō maṇḍana . suhṛjjanasvāntacandrakāntacandra . satyahariścandra . paramantra . kuṭilō pāyajaladharapraḷayapavamaāna . Abhaṅgurābhimāna . paramantri[vyūha ?] pratirūḍhaghaṭanahērambamantrasiddha . saṅkalpasiddha . paramantrivivēkabālāta pamōgha

mēghāḍambara . turagakhuradhūḷicuḷukitāmbara . paramantridurmmantra bhūtōccāṭanadivyamantra . svāmihitakalanaikamantra . paramantravētāḷavikāra vidrāvaṇōnnidrabuddhiyantra [.] kapaṭajanajīvanākarṣaṇaghaṭitaghaṭīyantra . parama ntradurnnayaduṣṭagrahanigrahōpāyanirapāya nītitantramantratantrasvatantra . praṇama dakhilanṛpatimaṇimakuṭa kiraṇanikara nirantaraprakāśitadigantarōpaśalya .

ripuhṛdayaśalya . samarārṇṇavakarṇṇadhāra . ṣaṭdarśanādhāra . sakalakalā kalāpanikaṣōpala . śamitāpannadainyacāpala . saṅgītasāhityakarṇṇāva tamsa . sacivakulōttamsa . smitapūrvvābhibhāṣaṇa . vivēkabhūṣaṇa . tribhuvanalakṣmīvilāsabhavana . vijayanagarādhīśvara . śrīvīrahariharamahā rājasambhāvanāsanātha . śrīmanmahāpradhānamuddayadaṇḍanātha . vijayībhava . vijayī bhava . §

nityānamranarēndraratna makuṭī nīrājitāṅghridvaya pratyādiṣṭa samastaduṣṭasaci vabhrājiṣṇunā tējasā . vidyāratnamanīṣiṇām hariharakṣmāpa pradhānōttama śrīman muddayadaṇḍanāyaka sukhī bhūyāssahasram samāḥ . 2 1 śrīmuddayadaṇḍanāthasya praśastām virudāvalīm . Akārṣīdabhijānārtthamabhirāmaḥsarasvatīm . § 2 Om . 2 saṅgrāmasthalamaṇḍapēn(ā)vilasat kōṭīraratnānalē mādyatku
ra kumbhakūṭaviga
ḷanmukdhāphalam lājayan . śrīmānmuddhayadaṇḍanāyakavibhuḥ pāṇau karōtu kra māt pratyarthiddhvaji nīsarōjanayanām (.) patmā
layā bhāgyabhū ḥ . 23 Ōm . karakṛtamaparādham kṣantumarhanti santaḥ . § Ōm §

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
